extension.summary: N Streams — movies and TV via HLS
N Streams — movies and TV via HLS
extension.description: N Streams is a video plugin for Kodi 21 (Omega) that aggregates publicly available HLS sources and plays them through InputStream Adaptive. Browse movies and TV shows, search across providers, and stream with proper header forwarding for protected manifests and segments.

N Streams is a video plugin for Kodi 21 (Omega) that aggregates publicly available HLS sources and plays them through InputStream Adaptive. Browse movies and TV shows, search across providers, and stream with proper header forwarding for protected manifests and segments.
extension.disclaimer: The authors are not responsible for the content provided by third-party sources.
The authors are not responsible for the content provided by third-party sources.
extension.news: v1.0.5 (2026-06-18) - Pi-local goojara extractor (kodi-addon/lib/extractors/goojara.py). Scrapes directly from the Pi's residential IP so Cloudflare's data-center-IP gate on Railway no longer blocks playback. Falls through to Railway if the local path fails. - Exact normalized title match preferred over fuzzy similarity — "The Boys" no longer accidentally pairs with "TallBoyz (2019)". v1.0.4 (2026-06-18) - script.module.resolveurl import is now OPTIONAL so the addon installs on Kodi instances without the Gujal repo. Playback still requires it; install the Gujal repo to enable. v1.0.3 (2026-06-18) - Pivot to goojara as the live source provider (embed.su parked, vidsrc Turnstile-walled, miruro JWE-encrypted — all unworkable). - script.module.resolveurl now a hard dependency: hosts the per-session hoster URL crack (doodstream / luluvdo / wootly / streamplay). - Playback branches on container: MP4 from hosters uses Kodi's default ffmpeg player; .m3u8 stays on inputstream.adaptive. - Backend goojara extractor: in-flight dedupe, parallel A-Z page batches, stale-slug invalidation with one-shot retry. v1.0.0 (2026-06-18) - Initial release of N Streams for Kodi 21 (Omega). - HLS playback via InputStream Adaptive 21.x with manifest and segment header forwarding. - Browse, search, and play movies and TV episodes from supported public sources. - Resume and watched-state tracking via Kodi's library hooks.
